summary: Completed comprehensive testing of United Hands Foundation NGO platform. All 22 backend API tests passed. Frontend testing verified unified login flow, dynamic homepage content, and admin dashboard functionality. Fixed one bug: logout was not clearing uhf_admin_token.

issues: Some test gallery images (TEST_Image_94b5d710, Updated Image Title) show broken images due to example.com URLs from test data

action_items: Clean up test gallery images with example.com URLs from database
seed_data_creation: Test users created during pytest execution with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Unified login redirects admin to /uhf-admin/dashboard and regular users to homepage. Homepage dynamically loads founder photos from /api/site-assets (Cloudinary URLs), gallery images from /api/gallery, and pillars from /api/pillars. Admin dashboard has all CRUD operations working for Projects, Gallery, Team Pillars.

bugs_fixed.issue: Logout was not clearing uhf_admin_token from localStorage

features_verified: Unified login: admin logs in at /login, gets role=admin, redirected to /uhf-admin/dashboard
Unified login: regular user logs in at /login, gets role=user, stays on homepage
After admin login, navbar shows name 'Omkar' and Logout button
After user login, navbar shows username and Logout button
Logout clears all tokens (including uhf_admin_token) and redirects to homepage
/uhf-admin route shows same UserAuth login form as /login
Homepage dynamically loads founder photos from /api/site-assets (Cloudinary URLs)
Homepage Heartiest Moments section shows gallery images from /api/gallery
Homepage Our Pillars section shows team members from /api/pillars
Admin Dashboard Projects tab has Add/Edit/Delete functionality
Admin Dashboard Gallery tab has Add/Edit/Delete functionality
Protected route /uhf-admin/dashboard redirects to login when not authenticated
